title: Banská Bystrica, Banská Bystrica Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Banská Bystrica, Banská Bystrica Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Banská Bystrica is a city in Banská Bystrica Region with a population of 76,018. A historic mining town in central Slovakia, the center of the Slovak National Uprising, surrounded by the Low Tatras mountains with excellent hiking and skiing.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
